docs-governance.observation: [enterprise-policy] OK — canonical workflow decision contract guard passed, R2 enterprise controls enforced

nonBlockingIssues.description: Module-level Known Limitations sections in purchasing.md and inventory.md lack deferral notes to RECOMMENDATIONS.md, while their corresponding flow packets already have them. Minor consistency gap.
ERP-DOD-BIBLE.md still contains 'Open Decisions' headings internally (lines 695, 1296, 1676), but the file-level NON-CANONICAL banner makes this acceptable.

docs/frontend-api/endpoint-inventory.md still lists /api/v1/accounting/audit/digest without a deprecated marker. accounting-portal-endpoint-map.md notes deprecation but endpoint-inventory.md lacks the callout.
Role annotations are asymmetric between accounting audit endpoints (no explicit role doc) and enterprise audit endpoints (ROLE_ADMIN or ROLE_ACCOUNTING documented).
Profile-audit gap documented in three places (core-audit-runtime-settings.md, RECOMMENDATIONS.md, auth-identity.md). Acceptable for different audiences but could drift if only one is updated.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider adding a convention that module-level Known Limitations sections should carry the same deferral pattern as flow-packet sections when their content overlaps with RECOMMENDATIONS.md entries.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Features docs-authoritative-recommendations-register found that purchasing.md and inventory.md Known Limitations sections overlap with RECOMMENDATIONS.md items but lack deferral notes, while their corresponding flow packets (procure-to-pay.md, inventory-management.md) already carry them.
